Children.Caption: &Finish

Children.Caption: Refresh
Children.Synopsis: Update the page with any changes made by other users.

Children.Caption: User Setup
Children.Synopsis: Open the User Setup page, where you can configure user-specific settings.

Children.Caption: Document Output Setup
Children.Synopsis: Open the Document Output Setup page, where you can configure general settings for the Document Output module.

Children.Caption: Welcome to the setup of Document Output
To use Document Output you must complete this setup.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Choose Next to set up Document Output.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Please choose if you would like to do a full or custom setup of Document Output.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Full setup will set up default Document Output templates, email signatures, SMTP setup and create job queues to send emails in the background.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Custom setup will allow you to control each step of the configuration and adjust more advanced settings.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Setup Type
Children.Synopsis: Specifies if the setup is full or custom.

Children.Caption: Please choose if you want to import templates from Continia Online or from a file.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Import from
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the Import From field.

Children.Caption: Template filename
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the Template File Name field.

Children.Caption: Templates are what defines the text in emails, merge fields, and more.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Please Choose how you want to send emails.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Email Sending Method
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the Email Sending Method field.

Children.Caption: Email Sending Method
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the Email Sending Method field.

Children.Caption: Link users with salespeople, used for email signatures:
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Open in Excel
Children.Synopsis: Opens an Excel file with the data exported from the list (selected filters and columns).

Children.Caption: Set Handled (DO) on old posted documents. To ensure that you do not email old documents.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: Set on documents posted before
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the Set on Documents Posted Before field.

Children.Caption: No. of Sales Shipments
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the No. of Sales Shipments field.

Children.Caption: No. of Sales Invoices
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the No. of Sales Invoices field.

Children.Caption: No. of Sales Credit Memos
Children.Synopsis: Specifies the value of the No. of Sales Credit Memos field.

Children.Caption: Choose Finish to enable the specified settings and complete the setup.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: We hope you will enjoy working with Document Output.
Children.Name: InstructionalTextString

Children.Caption: &Back
Children.Synopsis: Return to the previous step in the assisted setup guide.

Children.Caption: &Next
Children.Synopsis: Proceed to the next step in the assisted setup guide.

Children.Caption: &Finish
Children.Synopsis: Complete the setup process and apply all configured settings.
